_meta.purpose: TB chest X-ray (CXR) finding -> significance. Keys are YOLO class names from the tb_cxr detector. Screening/triage aid for pulmonary TB and common CXR findings; a radiologist reports and microbiology (smear/GeneXpert/culture) confirms TB. Decision support only.
_meta.source: Standard chest radiology + WHO TB screening. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

tb.name: Findings suggestive of TB
tb.note: CRITICAL: airborne isolation + confirm with sputum smear/GeneXpert/culture (notifiable).

cavitation.name: Cavitation
cavitation.disease: Post-primary TB (upper-lobe cavity), abscess, cavitating cancer
cavitation.note: Upper-lobe cavitation is classic for infectious/highly transmissible TB.

miliary.name: Miliary pattern
miliary.note: CRITICAL: diffuse tiny nodules -> disseminated TB, urgent.

pleural_effusion.name: Pleural effusion
pleural_effusion.disease: TB pleuritis, parapneumonic, malignant, heart failure

nodule.name: Pulmonary nodule / mass
nodule.note: Characterise size/margins; malignancy risk -> CT + follow-up.

fibrosis.name: Fibrosis / scarring
fibrosis.note: Upper-lobe fibrosis + volume loss suggests prior TB.
